skill_trees.description: Foundational to advanced AI/ML engineering skills covering Python, ML frameworks, LLMs and deployment.

nodes.title: Python Basics
nodes.description: Variables, data types, loops, functions, and modules.

nodes.title: Python OOP
nodes.description: Classes, inheritance, dunder methods, dataclasses.

nodes.title: Advanced Python
nodes.description: Generators, decorators, async/await, type hints, metaclasses.

nodes.title: NumPy & Pandas
nodes.description: Array operations, DataFrames, vectorisation, and data wrangling.

nodes.title: ML Fundamentals
nodes.description: Supervised / unsupervised learning, loss functions, gradient descent.

nodes.title: Deep Learning
nodes.description: Neural networks, backprop, CNNs, RNNs with PyTorch.

nodes.title: LLM Fundamentals
nodes.description: Transformers, attention, tokenisation, prompt engineering basics.

nodes.title: RAG Systems
nodes.description: Vector databases, embeddings, retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

nodes.title: AI Agents
nodes.description: LangChain / LangGraph agent architectures, tool use, memory, multi-agent systems.

nodes.title: MLOps & Deployment
nodes.description: Model serving, Docker, CI/CD for ML, monitoring, drift detection.

nodes.title: AI Engineering Boss Battle
nodes.description: Build a fully functional RAG-powered AI agent with evaluation and observability.

skill_trees.description: Full-stack web development from HTML/CSS basics to production-ready Next.js and FastAPI systems.

nodes.title: HTML & CSS
nodes.description: Semantic HTML, CSS layouts (flexbox/grid), responsive design.

nodes.title: JavaScript Core
nodes.description: DOM manipulation, async patterns, ES6+, fetch API.

nodes.title: TypeScript
nodes.description: Type system, generics, utility types, strict mode, type-safe APIs.

nodes.title: React Fundamentals
nodes.description: Components, hooks, state management, useEffect, React Query.

nodes.title: Next.js 14
nodes.description: App Router, Server Components, data fetching, middleware, deployment.

nodes.title: Python Backend
nodes.description: FastAPI, Pydantic, async patterns, dependency injection.

nodes.title: Databases
nodes.description: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, indexing, query optimisation, ORMs.

nodes.title: Fullstack Deployment
nodes.description: Docker, CI/CD, Vercel, Railway, environment management.

nodes.title: Web Dev Boss Battle
nodes.description: Build and deploy a production full-stack app with auth, DB, and CI/CD.

skill_trees.description: Statistical analysis, data wrangling, visualisation, and machine learning for insights.

nodes.title: Statistics Basics
nodes.description: Descriptive stats, distributions, hypothesis testing, p-values.

nodes.title: Data Wrangling
nodes.description: Pandas pipelines, missing data, feature engineering, merging.

nodes.title: Data Visualisation
nodes.description: Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly, storytelling with data.

nodes.title: ML for Data Science
nodes.description: Sklearn pipelines, cross-validation, feature selection, ensemble methods.

nodes.title: Time Series Analysis
nodes.description: ARIMA, Prophet, LSTM for forecasting, anomaly detection.

nodes.title: Data Science Boss Battle
nodes.description: End-to-end Kaggle-style competition: EDA → model → deploy predictions.

skill_trees.description: Distributed systems, scalability patterns, and production engineering principles.

nodes.title: Networking Fundamentals
nodes.description: TCP/IP, HTTP/HTTPS, DNS, load balancing basics.

nodes.title: API Design
nodes.description: REST principles, versioning, pagination, rate limiting, OpenAPI.

nodes.title: Caching Strategies
nodes.description: Redis, CDN, cache invalidation patterns, TTL design.

nodes.title: Databases at Scale
nodes.description: Sharding, replication, CAP theorem, partitioning, indexes at scale.

nodes.title: Distributed Systems
nodes.description: Consensus, event sourcing, CQRS, message queues, microservices.

nodes.title: System Design Boss Battle
nodes.description: Design a Twitter/YouTube-scale system end-to-end with capacity estimates.
